description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark, polished finish and a sturdy, professional appearance. The desk features three smoothly contoured drawers on the right side, each with a subtle integrated handle for easy access. The left side is open beneath the desktop, providing ample legroom for a seated user, while the back and sides are enclosed with solid wood panels. The desk is supported by four robust legs, two of which are visible as metallic or painted supports at the front corners. The top surface is broad and flat, ideal for writing, working, or placing office equipment. The overall design is functional and elegant, suitable for formal or professional environments.
description: A dark, polished wooden desk with three right-side drawers, a flat top, and sturdy legs, designed for professional or office use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers on the right, open leg space on the left, and the main desktop surface.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the desk, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood panel across the back and both rear legs.
description_view_3: Left side view with a solid wood panel and no visible drawers or openings.
attribute_orientation: The side with the three drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk, while the solid panel side is the back.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or computer workstation in a professional office setting
